title: Debug assertion exprSrcCount: Assertion `0' failed
poc: SELECT (0, 0) IN(SELECT MIN(c0), NTILE(0) OVER()) FROM t0;
description:
mrigger added on 2019-12-27 19:39:20:
The following test case triggers a debug assertion error:
CREATE TABLE t0(c0);
SELECT (0, 0) IN(SELECT MIN(c0), NTILE(0) OVER()) FROM t0; -- sqlite3.c:103486: exprSrcCount: Assertion `0' failed.
key_bug_features: SELECT with NTILE(0) causes assertion failure
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INTEGER, c2 TEXT, c3 REAL, c4 BLOB);
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3, c4) VALUES (1, 'test', 3.14, X'0001');
CREATE TABLE t2(c5 INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, c6 INTEGER DEFAULT NULL);
SELECT (0, 0) IN(SELECT MIN(c1), NTILE(0) OVER() FROM t1);
